title: Recognizes Roz Kolora's Heart in the Mystical Cuatro
location: Initial confrontation site where the Mystical Cuatro is revealed
situation: Manus encounters the Mystical Cuatro and immediately identifies the heart within as Roz Kolora's, turning a tense meeting into a deeply personal mission.
knows: The heart inside the Mystical Cuatro belongs to Roz Kolora
The artifact is directly tied to his emotional bond with Roz
His role in the conflict is now personal, not just strategic
does_not_know: How Roz Kolora's heart was placed in the Mystical Cuatro
